strengths: 12+ years fullstack development with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and relational databases across multiple companies
Demonstrated commitment to software craftsmanship, TDD, and clean architecture through job descriptions, workshops, and open-source work
Proven ability to own technical decisions and grow responsibility, having progressed to Staff level and founded GISCollective
concerns: Staff Software Engineer role is substantial overqualification for entry/mid-level IC position, raising retention and satisfaction risks
Currently employed for only 2 months (April 2025) after stable 3+ year tenure; timing suggests possible misalignment with role level or compensation
No explicit mention of PostgreSQL, AWS services (ECS, EKS, RDS, S3), or Kubernetes despite these being standard qualifications in modern stacks
response.justification: This candidate exceeds all core technical requirements with exceptional fullstack capabilities and clear software quality mindset. However, the Staff Engineer background for an entry/mid-level role presents a critical concern: this appears to be a significant career step backward, raising questions about motivation and retention likelihood. The very recent role start (2 months) after longer tenures adds to concerns about fit and stability. While technically ideal, the seniority mismatch suggests poor career alignment.
